title: ReviewPanelResult
description: Output of the review_panel skill — consolidated panel verdict with confidence and dissent tracking

task_ref.description: Echoed from the request — identifies the artifact under review

confidence.description: Fraction of reviewers agreeing with final_verdict (majority/unanimous) or normalized weighted score (weighted)

individual_reviews.description: Normalized copy of each reviewer's input

dissenting.description: Reviewer names whose individual verdict differs from final_verdict

recommendations.description: Deduplicated notes collected from reviewers who voted warn or fail

error.description: Human-readable error message; only present when status is error
